entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being studied for combining ability and yield

entities.name: STAYGREEN
entities.description: A trait developed through hybridization to improve food security

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process used to develop staygreen genotypes

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY STRATEGY
entities.description: The overarching goal of developing staygreen genotypes in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The environmental region where the food security strategy is applied

entities.name: FULL DIALLEL MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A 6 x 6 mating design used to obtain sorghum synthetics

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: A trait used to measure diversity and maturity in sorghum genotypes

entities.name: MATERNAL EFFECTS
entities.description: The influence of maternal genes on the regulation of maturity

entities.name: MATERNAL GENES
entities.description: Genes from the maternal parent that regulate maturity

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The developmental stage regulated by maternal genes

entities.name: GENETIC PREDICTABILITY RATIOS
entities.description: A metric used to determine the role of additive versus non-additive gene action

entities.name: PANICLE WEIGHT
entities.description: A yield-related trait showing high genetic predictability

entities.name: GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A yield-related trait showing high genetic predictability

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: The gene action that played a larger role in controlling flowering and weight traits

entities.name: NON-ADDITIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that played a smaller role in trait control compared to additive gene action

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: A trait exhibited by specific parental lines and exploited for drought evasion

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of developing drought evading hybrids

entities.name: DROUGHT EVADING
entities.description: The ability of specific synthetics to avoid drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: The environmental stress that hybrids are designed to evade

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: A trait exhibited by specific F1 synthetic crosses

entities.name: ICSV III IN
entities.description: A parental line exhibiting earliness

entities.description: A parental line exhibiting earliness

entities.description: A parental line exhibiting earliness

entities.description: An F1 synthetic identified as drought evading

entities.description: An F1 synthetic identified as both drought evading and high yielding

entities.description: An F1 synthetic identified as drought evading
